name: generate_pptx
description:
Create or replace a professional PPTX (PowerPoint) presentation at the specified path within a registered source directory.

Use this tool when the user asks to create or update a PowerPoint presentation. Design slides with clear hierarchy, consistent theming, and purposeful layouts.

Capabilities:
- Customizable theme: primary color, accent color, background, title/text colors, fonts
- Slide layouts: title, content, section, comparison
- Body text with inline bullet detection (lines starting with "- " or "• ")
- Explicit bullet_items arrays
- Tables on content slides with themed header row and alternating bands
- Speaker notes on any slide
- Slide numbers on all slides

Layout guide:
- `title`: Full-slide primary-color background with centered title + subtitle. Auto-chosen for first slide.
- `content`: Header bar with title + body area below. Default for most slides.
- `section`: Same as title layout — use for section dividers.
- `comparison`: Two-column layout with left/right titles and body content, separated by a divider.

Design tips:
- Keep bullet items to 5-7 per slide
- Use `comparison` layout for pros/cons, before/after, option A vs B
- Add `notes` for speaker talking points (not shown during presentation)
- Use `table` on content slides for structured data
- Set theme colors once; they apply to all slides consistently

path.description: Output file path (absolute or relative to a source directory). Must end in .pptx and be within a registered source directory.

content.description: Structured content for the PPTX presentation.

theme.description: Presentation-wide visual theme. All colors are 6-digit hex (no #).

primary_color.description: Primary color for title slide background and header bars. Default: "1F4E79".

accent_color.description: Accent color for comparison titles and dividers. Default: "2E75B6".

title_color.description: Title text color on header bars. Default: "FFFFFF" (white on dark bar).

text_color.description: Body text color on content slides. Default: "333333".

title_font.description: Font for titles and headings. Default: "Calibri Light".

body_font.description: Font for body text and bullets. Default: "Calibri".

slides.description: Array of slide definitions. At least one slide is required.

layout.description: Slide layout. Default: "content" (or "title" for first slide if >1 slides).

title.description: Slide title shown in header bar (content/comparison) or centered (title/section).

body.description: Body text. Lines starting with "- " or "• " auto-render as bullets.

notes.description: Speaker notes for this slide. Not visible during presentation; shown in presenter view.

table.description: Table rendered on the slide (content layout). Has themed header row and alternating row bands.

headers.description: Column headers (white text on primary-color background).

left_body.description: Left column body text (comparison layout only).

left_bullet_items.description: Left column bullet items (comparison layout only).

right_body.description: Right column body text (comparison layout only).

right_bullet_items.description: Right column bullet items (comparison layout only).
